audience: indie founders who want analytics without a data team
objective: get them to start a free 14-day trial
docs: Tidepool is product analytics for small teams. It auto-instruments page views and clicks — no tracking plan required. Pricing: Free up to 10k events/mo; Pro is $29/mo for 1M events; no annual lock-in. It integrates with React, Vue, and plain HTML via a one-line snippet. Data is stored in the EU and is GDPR-friendly; you can self-host on request. There is no SQL required — dashboards are built by clicking. Support is email-only on Free, with a shared Slack on Pro. Tidepool does NOT do session replay or A/B testing today; those are on the roadmap for later this year. The free trial needs no credit card.
